data.title: recipe-engine-adapter: exit code 2 table description omits timeout scenario
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The Exit Code Definitions table documents exit code 2 only as 'Engine unavailable or below minimum version' but timeout also produces exit code 2 with degraded:true. The table description should mention timeout to be self-consistent with the Timeout Protocol section.
File: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
Category: correctness
